title: Blox AI POST /troubleshoot/user-reply request body
description: Phase 11 contract. The app submits this body via the BLE proxy when the user answers a `user_question` event. Container looks up session by session_id (404 if expired/unknown), validates question_id matches the most recent unanswered user_question for that session, appends reply_text to model context, refreshes TTL, then resumes the model's reasoning on the open SSE stream.

session_id.description: From the `session_started` event of the original /troubleshoot call.

reply_text.description: Freeform user text. For expected_response_type=boolean the app sends 'yes'/'no'; for choice it sends the selected option's exact string. Container does NOT enforce match against expected_response_type — that's a UX-side concern.
